privileged_info_summary: Task 'rotate_90cw@1' uses a real Unsplash image (photo-1490750967868-88aa4486c946) cropped to 600x800 portrait orientation as the test data. The primary Unsplash URL (687x1031) is no longer available (404 error). The rotation verification correctly implements PIL's rotate(-90, expand=True) which produces proper 90-degree clockwise rotation with dimension swap (600x800→800x600). The SSIM threshold of ≥0.95 is mathematically sound but operationally very tight, with realistic GIMP JPEG export achieving only 0.9598 (0.0098 above threshold). The verifier requires 3 out of 4 criteria for 75% pass: dimension swap, rotation accuracy (SSIM≥0.95), image modification, and quality (SSIM>0.85). Data is real (from Unsplash), not synthetic.
